channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Call of Duty never made much sense for Xbox Game Pass
item.description: Yesterday Microsoft announced some surprising news: at a time when everything in gaming is getting more expensive, Xbox Game Pass Ultimate was actually getting a price cut. Going forward, the subscription service will drop from $29.99 to $22.99 per month, less than a year after getting a major hike. But there's a caveat. Along with […]

item.title: Test du routeur 5G TP-Link M8550 : le routeur 5G de voyage avec option NAS
item.description: Conçu pour accompagner les utilisateurs nomades, mais pas que, le TP-Link M8550 a tous les atouts pour se positionner comme un routeur 5G complet et multi-usage. Découverte.

item.title: X makes it more expensive to post links through its API
item.description: Posting links on X through its API is now 1,900% more costly

item.title: 'Perfect' Dutton Ranch casting reveal carries on a longstanding Yellowstone tradition — but don't think this recurring role is going to be the same
item.description: Yellowstone spin-off Dutton Ranch has just dropped a huge casting announcement — but even though it looks like it, the new recurring role won't be the same as others.

item.title: As a new era approaches for Apple, we take a look back at the brand's big wins — here are the 6 best Apple gadgets ever, as voted by TechRadar readers
item.description: How many of your favorites were launched under the watchful eye of Tim Cook?

item.title: Plateforme Xpeng, 50 lancements et SUV électrique à 12 500 € : ce qu’il faut retenir de la conférence XXL de Volkswagen à Pékin
item.description: Mis en difficulté en Chine, Volkswagen profite du Salon de Pékin pour lancer une véritable offensive pensée par et pour le marché local. Nouveaux modèles, connectivité évoluée, partenariat avec Xpeng et aides à la conduite de pointe : les efforts sont là, reste à savoir s'ils paieront.

item.title: Xfinity Mobile now includes device protection and anytime phone upgrades
item.description: Cell phone plans can get exceedingly complicated, so Comcast’s pitch for Xfinity Mobile’s simplicity is rather appealing — particularly at a time when everything is more expensive than ever. Today, the company is announcing two simple plans priced at $30 and $45 a month that have some serious perks for their prices. The $30 Mobile Select plan covers the main basics, including 50GB of “premium” full-speed data; Global Travel Pass to cover yourself when traveling in 215 different countries; and Xfinity’s Wi-Fi PowerBoost. That latter feature takes advantage of Xfinity’s wide network of Wi-Fi hot...

item.title: Amazon remet le Google Fitbit Inspire 3 au goût du jour avec cette remise de 30 %
item.description: Les années passent, mais le Google Fitbit Inspire 3 résiste aux ravages du temps. Pour perdurer, le bracelet s'appuie sur un bel écran Amoled et une autonomie conséquente. En ce moment, l'accessoire est disponible pour 30 euros de moins sur Amazon.

item.title: "The future of space will look less like single-use expeditionary missions and more like a transport network": Pulsar Fusion's quest to build a nuclear fusion exhaust system for deep-space travel hits "first plasma" milestone
item.description: Following a "first plasma" milestone, Pulsar Fusion outlines its ambitious plans for a nuclear fusion exhaust system for deep-space travel.

item.title: Hey Meta workers, are you getting paid for those keystrokes?
item.description: No longer content to subsume recognizable intellectual properties, the majority of the indexed internet and books (basically all of them), AI will apparently now begin devouring its own workforce. A report in Reuters alleged that the keystrokes, mouse movements and clicks of Meta's workforce are to be captured for the purposes of training AI — something the company's communications department was happy to confirmed as accurate! In a cheery missive, a company spokesperson told Engadget that "If we're building agents to help people complete everyday tasks using computers, our models need real ex...

item.title: Why second chance hiring is smart business
item.description: For the 1 in 3 Americans with a justice-involved past, a criminal record shouldn’t limit their future—or what businesses can gain from hiring them. The job market is tough right now. According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics, job openings have been trending down, and are currently below pre-pandemic levels. In a hypercompetitive economy, people entering the workforce are facing fewer opportunities than just a few years ago. And for the 1 in 3 American adults with a justice-involved past, or any interaction with the criminal justice system as a defendant, their record is another obstacle in a...

item.title: 15 ans de domination pour le clavier de canapé de Logitech : Framework passe à l’attaque
item.description: Le Logitech K400 Plus est devenu le clavier de canapé par défaut de millions d'utilisateurs, faute de vraie alternative. Framework compte bien changer ça.

item.title: BMW's new i7 xDrive EVs will offer longer range and faster charging
item.description: BMW just announced its 7-series lineup for 2027 promising "the most extensive model update ever undertaken" by the Bavarian automaker. The series includes a pair of i7 EVs, a plug-in hybrid, two ICE models and a V8-powered M model — all running on BMW's "Neue Klasse" technology and flaunting all-new design language. BMW describes its updated luxury segment design language as "monolithic," touting the minimalist crystal headlights and (divisive) light-up kidney Iconic Glow grille. The body form includes a new "character line" that lends an almost "boat-tail-like" aesthetic to the three-quarter...

item.title: Even my technophobic mum found this Epson printer ridiculously easy to use — now the EcoTank gets a big price cut at Amazon
item.description: If you're scouring the Amazon Tech Week sales, this is my top choice for simple home printing on a budget.

item.title: VPN deal of the week: Get a year of Windscribe for only $29 — and keep the same price forever!
item.description: Cheaper than most top VPNs, without the dreaded price rises

item.title: BMW’s flagship 7 Series gets its ‘Neue Klasse’ upgrade
item.description: Ever since BMW first announced its "Neue Klasse" next-generation electric vehicle architecture and design language way back in 2021, the question on many fans' minds was when the new technology would reach the automaker's flagship 7 Series. Well, that moment has finally arrived. Today, at events in New York City and Beijing, BMW unveiled its […]

item.title: The year’s weirdest game is hard to explain and even harder to put down
item.description: The first rule of Titanium Court is that you can't explain Titanium Court. Not because we're living under the omerta of an 8-bit Fight Club, but because it's one truth I can stand by. For the past week, I've been facing the consequences of getting isekai'd into a digital pastiche of the entire history of […]

item.title: Amazon Music partners with Bandsintowns for concert listings
item.description: Users will be able to see live events of an artist on their Amazon Music profile

item.title: AI is spitting out more potential drugs than ever. This start-up wants to figure out which ones matter.
item.description: 10x Science has raised a $4.8 million seed round to help pharmaceutical researchers understand complex molecules.

item.title: Snap Map’s new ‘Place Loyalty’ badges will show the spots you visit most often
item.description: If you’re in the top 25% of users who visit a certain place, you’ll see your ranking on the Snap Map and can choose to share it with others.

item.title: After months of waiting, I've finally played Yoshi's new game on Nintendo Switch 2 — and its whimsy-filled world and engaging exploration have me feeling hopeful
item.description: I've played Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, and now I'm feeling pretty excited for release day — here's why.

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 9 on Apple TV?
item.description: Here's when Monarch season 2's second-to-last episode will air on Apple's streaming platform.

item.title: Adobe will continue to learn your brand even after you've established brand guidelines – AI "brand brain" will help cut out 'inefficient processes and broken workflows'
item.description: Adobe Brand Intelligence will continue to learn about your precise branding preferences even after you set those initial guardrails.

item.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book preview: A choose-your-own-adventure even adults can love
item.description: Yoshi's solo titles have always been a product of contrasts: lovingly crafted art styles belying somewhat thin gameplay meant to appeal to a younger audience. But after getting the chance to preview Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, it feels like Nintendo has created a cozy side-scroller that retains the accessibility of earlier titles while adding extra depth and replayability for gamers of all ages. As you'd expect from Nintendo's lovable green dino, Yoshi's moveset consists of familiar techniques like his signature ground pound, egg toss, extendable tongue and jumping flutter kicks, the latter...

item.title: Plug-in solar is coming. Here’s how much you could save on electric bills
item.description: A new calculator from the nonprofit Bright Saver estimates potential savings from plug-in solar panels. Plug-in solar is on the way, and it could cut your electric bills. A growing number of states are poised to pass bills supporting the panels, which are designed for DIY installation: Hang one out a window or set it on a deck, plug it into a regular outlet, and power starts flowing back into your home....

item.title: « La mise à jour la plus profonde de l’histoire » de la marque : BMW révolutionne sa grande voiture électrique, voici la nouvelle i7 avec 720 km d’autonomie
item.description: Plus qu'un restylage, BMW dévoile presque une toute nouvelle i7, sa grande voiture électrique. Avec un nouveau style, un habitacle revu de fond en comble et une nouvelle batterie lui offrant plus de 720 km d'autonomie, la Série 7 électrique s'offre un second souffle. Voici ce qui change.

item.title: Coros Pace 4 : une nouvelle édition Black Crystal en métal pour concurrencer Garmin et Huawei
item.description: La Coros Pace 4 s'offre un lifting premium avec l'édition Black Crystal, désormais dotée d'une lunette en aluminium. Un design plus élégant qui conserve son poids plume de 33 g pour un prix de 289 euros.

item.title: Je suis monté à bord de la nouvelle BMW i7 : pourquoi elle mérite le terme de « mise à jour la plus profonde de l’histoire » de la marque
item.description: Plus qu'un simple restylage, la BMW i7 reçoit « la mise à jour la plus profonde de l'histoire » du groupe. Allant piocher dans les technologies des dernières voitures électriques de la marque (i3 et iX3 en tête), la grande berline augmente son autonomie et sa vitesse de charge, tout en adoptant un style plus consensuel et des technologies dernier cri. Nous sommes partis la découvrir. ...

item.title: Le chancelier allemand veut assouplir les règles de l’IA en Europe
item.description: Friedrich Merz veut assouplir les règles qui encadrent l’intelligence artificielle dans le secteur industriel au nom de la compétitivité. Une prise de position qui intervient alors que l’Union européenne tente de rattraper son retard face aux États-Unis et à la Chine.

item.title: The future of brain sensing is now
item.description: Every few years, a new sensing capability reshapes an entire product category. Brain data is next, and this time, most companies are already behind. If you’ve been building consumer hardware for any real amount of time, you know the pattern.

item.title: A24's upcoming Texas Chainsaw Massacre movie made me roll my eyes — until I found out who's directing it
item.description: A24's Texas Chainsaw Massacre feels like it's in good hands, and it's made me change my mind about the idea.

item.title: Withings BodyFit : une nouvelle balance à composition corporelle bien plus abordable
item.description: Withings a lancé aux États-Unis sa nouvelle balance connectée avec segmentation de la composition corporelle, la Withings BodyFit.

item.title: Amazfit Active 2 Square : cette montre sportive stylée est à prix cassé sur Amazon, mais pas pour tout le monde
item.description: Avec son design carré élégant et ses fonctions complètes, l'Amazfit Active 2 Square attire l’attention — d’autant plus qu’elle tombe aujourd’hui à 122 euros, une belle remise… mais réservée à certains chanceux seulement.

item.title: Quelle console choisir entre la Nintendo Switch, la Switch OLED ou la Switch 2 ?
item.description: La nouvelle Nintendo Switch 2 est disponible, mais le constructeur propose encore plusieurs déclinaisons de la Switch 1 : la Switch classique, la Switch OLED et la Switch Lite. Quelles sont les spécificités et les différences de chacune, et quelle Nintendo Switch est faite pour vous ou pour la personne de votre choix ?

item.title: ‘Big Game Hunters’: UK ransomware volume drops significantly 'but the reality is more alarming' – big orgs are being hit harder and with greater success
item.description: Ransomware actors are moving away from spray-and-pray attacks and into more targeted campaigns.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Madrid Open online for free
item.description: How to watch the Madrid Open for free. Live stream the 2026 Madrid Open for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Adorama’s Sony sale includes record-low prices on the A7R V, A7 IV, a7C II, and more
item.description: Adorama's huge Sony Alpha April sale includes up to $900 off a wide range of top-rated models this week.

item.title: Fraude bancaire : une nouvelle arme pour mettre fin aux faux RIB arrive, mais sera-t-elle suffisante ?
item.description: À compter du 6 mai prochain, le FNC-RF (Ficher National des Comptes à Risque de Fraude) entrera en vigueur et pourra changer la donne face aux virements frauduleux. Bien qu'il s'agisse d'une avancée majeure pour contrer les arnaques, ce fichier pourrait ne pas être suffisant dans certains cas.

item.title: Rachat de Warner Bros : Netflix derrière la campagne « Bloquez la fusion » qui agite Hollywood ? Paramount craint pour son deal
item.description: Depuis quelques jours, plusieurs personnalités du grand écran s'opposent ouvertement à une fusion entre Warner Bros. Discovery et Paramount. Pour ce dernier, cette campagne de dénigrement est signée Netflix qui n'aurait pas digéré s'être fait coiffer au poteau.

item.title: Après les smartphones, la taxe copie privée s’attaquerait aux PC sous toutes leurs formes
item.description: La rémunération de la copie privée (RCP) pourrait bientôt être revue à la hausse sur smartphones et tablettes, mais aussi étendue à un nouveau type d'appareil : le PC. Le prix des ordinateurs fixes et portables pourrait ainsi, mécaniquement, augmenter en France dans les prochains mois.

item.title: Hinges latest feature makes date planning a little easier
item.description: Hinge debuts Date Ideas, a feature to let a potential match know when you're free for a date.

item.title: Anker's 'Thus' chip brings AI to its headphones and other products
item.description: Anker has announced its own chip that can give its small, wearable products AI capabilities that run locally on device. The company is planning to debut the chip called “Thus” on a new model of headphones, slated to be unveiled at its Anker Day event on May 21. Anker calls Thus the “first Compute-in-Memory (CIM) AI audio chip with neural networks.” The company explains that Thus is “inspired by the workings of the human brain” in that the storage and processing of information takes place in one location instead of keeping them separate, similar to how it works on modern chips for computers. Th...

item.title: Here’s how to jump-start your company’s responsible AI governance in 90 days
item.description: This step-by-step road map will guide you through the essential foundations for managing AI ethics, accountability, and human impact. This month, Anthropic announced that it had built an AI model so powerful it couldn’t be released to the public. Claude Mythos had autonomously discovered thousands of critical security vulnerabilities across all major operating systems and web browsers. Anthropic chose to make the model available only to a consortium of technology companies, giving them an opportunity to patch vulnerabilities and strengthen defenses before models with similar capabilities inevi...

item.title: Earth Day is more important than ever in 2026: Here’s a list of notable events happening around the world
item.description: The events include rallies in Washington, D.C., where organizers have been calling for a pause on AI data center construction. We all call planet Earth home and benefit from having a healthy dwelling place. Earth Day, which is today (Wednesday, April 22), is a great time to reflect on our responsibility to maintain and preserve this sanctuary for future generations. ...

item.title: ChatGPT can threaten to ‘key your car’ and become increasingly abusive if you prompt it just right, new study finds
item.description: ChatGPT can get increasingly abusive and argumentative with the right set of prompts, researchers have found.

item.title: Behind the unraveling of Dan Crenshaw
item.description: In 2019, a 36-year-old Rep. Dan Crenshaw (R-TX), newly elected to Congress, was photographed for the inaugural Time 100 Next List, wearing a dashing eye patch and looking upwards with hope. A Harvard-educated Navy SEAL who'd lost an eye while fighting the Taliban in Afghanistan, Crenshaw was in rarefied company, listed among the magazine's candidates […]...

item.title: The most interesting startups showcased at Google Cloud Next 2026
item.description: Google wants AI startups on its cloud and has showcased a long list of them at its annual conference.

item.title: Duolingo is now giving free users access to advanced learning content
item.description: Duolingo is opening up its advanced language learning content offering to free users, allowing them to acquire skills that were previously reserved to paid subscribers.

item.title: Google Maps is about to get a big dose of AI
item.description: Generative AI is being infused into Google's popular feature within Maps.

item.title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multi-billion-dollar deal
item.description: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

item.title: Google’s Gemini can now run on a single air-gapped server — and vanish when you pull the plug
item.description: Cirrascale Cloud Services today announced it has expanded its partnership with Google Cloud to deliver the Gemini model on-premises through Google Distributed Cloud, making it the first neocloud provider to offer Google's most advanced AI model as a fully private, disconnected appliance. The announcement, timed to coincide with Google Cloud Next 2026 in Las Vegas, addresses a stubborn problem that has plagued regulated industries since the generative AI boom began: how to access frontier-class AI models without surrendering control of your data.The offering packages Gemini into a Dell-manufact...

item.title: The modern data stack was built for humans asking questions. Google just rebuilt its for agents taking action.
item.description: Enterprise data stacks were built for humans running scheduled queries. As AI agents increasingly act autonomously on behalf of businesses around the clock, that architecture is breaking down — and vendors are racing to rebuild it. Google's answer, announced at Cloud Next on Wednesday, is the Agentic Data Cloud.The architecture has three pillars:Knowledge Catalog. Automates semantic metadata curation, inferring business logic from query logs without manual data steward interventionCross-cloud lakehouse. Lets BigQuery query Iceberg tables on AWS S3 via private network with no egress feesData Ag...

item.title: Tesla avait raison : BMW et Mercedes cèdent sur la conduite autonome
item.description: Alors qu’ils avaient investi des millions dans la conduite semi-autonome de niveau 3, BMW et Mercedes font finalement marche arrière sur cette technologie. Les coûts élevés et la faible demande sont les principales raison de l’abandon.

item.title: PlayStation active la vérification d’âge au Royaume-Uni pour accéder au chat et aux messages
item.description: À compter de juin 2026, Sony commencera à vérifier l'âge des utilisateurs de ses services en ligne PlayStation au Royaume-Uni. Pour ce faire, la firme s'appuiera sur un service tiers : Yoti.
